title: Modern Family — Pilot
description: The Dunphy, Pritchett, and Tucker-Pritchett families introduce themselves in this mockumentary-style pilot.
sentences: I don't know what to say about my kids.
Except I love them. I love them so much.
That's the thing about kids. You fall for them and there's nothing you can do about it.
We're like best friends, but I'm also the cool dad.
That's the vision.
My wife is smart and beautiful and I know she thinks I don't notice things.
But I notice everything.
Claire used to be this really fun, spontaneous person.
And I feel bad that I'm the reason she's not like that anymore.
I mean, I say that, but I don't really feel bad about it.
She's a great mother and that's more important.
Okay, here's the thing about my son Mitchell.
He's always been very dramatic.
When he was a kid, I might have contributed to that.
I might not have given him the approval that he needed.
I don't know, I'm not a psychiatrist.
Although, I did play one briefly on a telenovela.
I do a lot of things.
So Cam and I have decided to adopt a baby.
We felt the world needed one more kid with two dads who know show tunes.
I may have over-prepared for this moment.
Just a touch.
This is our new daughter. We named her Lily.
She is perfect. She has her mother's eyes.
I mean her birth mother's eyes.
Oh forget it.
The important thing is: we're a family.
And family is everything.
Whatever shape it comes in.
I love my family more than anything.
